case_title: CHELLY DILL VS. RAINFOREST CAFE,INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DILL, CHELLY AS TO DEFENDANT RAINFOREST CAFE,INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA RAIN FOREST CAFE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
